authorMeta.name: frontpage_eb
text:
Volunteering at a charity school in Kibera located in Nairobi was a truly eye-opening and heartwarming experience. 

My fiancé and I had the joy of teaching English to the children, and their enthusiasm was contagious. Knowing that our time there, along with the booking fees, helps support the school, pay the teachers, and feed the kids made it even more meaningful. Huge thanks to @kcoop.organization for making this possible! 

If you’re ever in Nairobi, don’t miss the chance to volunteer and be part of something impactful. Now more than ever @kcoop.organization is looking to collaborate and partner with tourists to teach in their school. This can be any subject or any skill including art, dancing, or anything you are good at that would be beneficial for the kids & no you don’t have to have prior teaching experience! 

#VolunteerExperience #Kibera #GiveBack #nairobi #kenya #nonprofitexperts #kiberaslums #kenya🇰🇪

authorMeta.name: unfiltered.with.et
text:
Two weeks ago, I left my comfort zone and came to Nairobi to chase a job. I had hope. I applied everywhere, walked everywhere, but nothing worked. My sister hosted me with so much love, but now, I have no job… and no more strength to keep trying here. I'm going back to the village — maybe that's where healing begins. 💔

authorMeta.name: jacobzemer
text:
Today, I’m reviewing RHO, a supplement company, to help you see through what’s likely to be the next big marketing trend: longevity.
The short version: RHO’s products are overpriced and under-dosed.
Here’s the breakdown:
🔘 NAD+: You need between 100-300mg per day. RHO’s formula has 100mg.
🔘 Resveratrol: Ideal dosage is 500-1000mg per day. RHO has only 75mg.
🔘 Curcumin: You need 400-600mg per day. RHO provides 200mg.
🔘 Glutathione: RHO includes 500mg, which is actually a decent amount, but you’re better off taking N-acetylcysteine and Glycine, the precursors to Glutathione, which are more bioavailable.
For these three supplements, RHO will cost you $130/month or $113/month if you subscribe and save.
Now, here's my routine and cost breakdown:
🔘 NMN – 500mg for $10/month
🔘 Curcumin – 500mg for $11/month
🔘 Resveratrol – 1000mg for $28/month
🔘 N-acetylcysteine + Glycine – $17/month

Total: $66/month, which is half the price of RHO, and more importantly, my dosages are actually effective.
🚨 NAD+ is a heavily debated supplement. I’ve heard strong perspectives on both if it’s worthless or worthwhile. A lot of scientists I respect say it’s useless to take while others see value in it. I personally am still taking NMN, because the $10/month it costs is negligible for me. However, I think the evidence could go either way at this time.
🚨 Resveratrol is another heavily debated longevity supplement. At this time, it seems like the evidence is not compelling for its use. I don’t think there will be any ill health effects but I don’t believe it is likely to be beneficial to humans.
Let me know what products to review next in the comments!

authorMeta.name: risperthemodel9704
text:
As *Little Miss Africa Kenya*, I am honored to represent Kenya at the prestigious *Little Mr & Miss Africa* pageant here in Nairobi! I am passionate about making a difference in the lives of children in need, and my advocacy focuses on organizing *food drives* to fight hunger and bring nourishment to vulnerable kids across my community.

My Mission
I believe that every child deserves access to nutritious food and a chance to thrive. Through my food drive initiatives, I aim to:
- *Support Kids in Need*: Bring food and hope to children facing hunger and hardship.
- *Raise Awareness*: Highlight the importance of addressing food insecurity and helping those less fortunate.
- *Inspire Kindness*: Encourage peers and communities to join in acts of compassion and support.

I am proud to be representing Kenya at Little Mr & Miss Africa, showcasing not just my personal efforts but also the spirit of kindness and generosity that defines many in Kenya. I look forward to sharing my story and inspiring others!

"Thank you for who will  support my journey! As Little Miss Africa Kenya, I'm committed to fighting hunger and helping kids through food drives. I'm excited to represent Kenya at Little Mr & Miss Africa in Nairobi!"@littlemisterandmissafrica #risperthemodel #fyp #BoldAndBeautiful #littlemissafricakenya2025

authorMeta.name: simbajuli001
text:
MASHIMONI KIBRA LINE 7 💯💪🏼
Support Kibera’s Boxing Champions

In the heart of Kibera, the passion for boxing burns bright. Young fighters are training hard, determined to rise above their circumstances and make a name for themselves. But resources are scarce, and every little bit helps.

If you have bandages, gloves, mouthguards, or any other boxing equipment lying unused, your contribution could make a world of difference. Even something as small as hand wraps can protect these fighters and keep their dreams alive.

We deeply appreciate anything you can share to support the boxing academies in Kibera. Whether it’s gear or words of encouragement, it all matters.

You can message me directly or visit the academies personally. mashimoni na Olympic Station kibera Line 7 na 8 Let’s empower the next generation of champions together!

#KiberaStrength #Kibra #StreetScenes #Boxing #YouthBoxing #Kenya #BoxingKenya #PadWork #BoxingDrills

authorMeta.name: panafricanlifestyle
text:
Nick and Charmaine Bey are back with an exciting update on their journey to the Motherland. After receiving a wave of thoughtful feedback from the global African community on where they should travel, the Beys have taken it all in, and they’re ready to share their curated list of African destinations. First stop: Nairobi, Kenya. The duo, known for their work as writers, producers, and co-founders of the wellness brand Bey Moss, are officially beginning their relocation journey to Africa. They’ll be joining the “Journey Back to Eden” initiative by Traverze Culture, a groundbreaking experience welcoming 200 members of the diaspora to Kenya for a transformative cultural celebration. Happening from December 2025 to January 2026, this historic event marks the first of its kind in East Africa. The Beys are answering the call, and you’re invited to be part of it.

To relocate, travel, or invest in Africa email info@panafricanlifestyle.com.
Get Africa 101 at panafricanlifestyle.com.

🎥 @Charmaine & Neek Bey & @Traverze Culture 
#JourneyBackToEden #Kenya #Nairobi #PanAfricanLifestyle #ReturnToAfrica #AfricanTravel #DiasporaToContinent
